awards.name: Graduate Recruitment Scholarship
awards.description: Awarded to high-achieving graduate students with significant research potential at the University of Alberta.
awards.significance: Recognizes exceptional academic performance and research capability in graduate programs

awards.name: Central Scholarship for College and University Students
awards.description: Awarded to the top 80,000 students nationwide for exemplary performance in Higher Secondary examinations.
awards.significance: Prestigious national scholarship recognizing top academic performers
highlights: Based on Higher Secondary exam performance
Four year scholarship covering undergraduate studies
